markets.question: Spread: CD Universidad Católica (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Chile Primera game, scheduled for March 14 at 7:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "CD Universidad Católica" if CD Universidad Católica win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Everton de Viña del Mar".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on anfp.cl. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.
markets.outcomes: ["CD Universidad Católica", "Everton de Viña del Mar"]

events.title: CD Universidad Católica vs. Everton de Viña del Mar - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Chile Primera game, scheduled for March 14 at 7:30 PM ET.

markets.question: Clube do Remo vs. EC Bahia: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Brazil Série A game between Clube do Remo and EC Bahia, scheduled for March 22 at 3:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Clube do Remo and EC Bahia each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on cbf.com.br. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.
